transcript.text: Hey I want to share this wild dream I had last night I actually had two of them but I only
Remember the first one for some reason I don't remember my dreams anymore but I had this wild
Dream last night that was like on some like town with a bunch of people like a group of people
Right and then everybody was sleeping it was like nighttime and then I look over I'm like in a
Central park of some like town or something right and then I look over and I see these three old men
Walk by and they're in robes you know like robes of wizards or something and they have like
Like like like like wizard long hair and beards and stuff and they walk by and I think they were
Walking by because they knew that I was the only one who was still awake and standing there
And I looked at all the people to see if the other people could see that the wizards were there and
I think that people were awake and stuff but the people couldn't see them so then I walk towards
Wizards and I look at them and they turn and they look at me and they weren't human like there was
Something there were of a race a different race you know like you have black white yellow race and
Right here on earth they're of like another race like that doesn't exist on earth right and one of
Them like looked really weird and he was at like dark skin and and they weren't smiling but they were
Just like like I could tell from there I was like those are aliens those are aliens and then they
Levitated you know like that movie um um the last mimsy when the little kids they levitate they were
Levitating just like that they start levitating and I was like I guess I was like you know sometimes
You feel like the fear like oh no those are aliens but I was like well I'm gonna levitate too so I
Levitated too and I levitated and I was like yeah watch me I'm levitating and then I levitated and then I
Was like well let's fly so I started flying like I can't remember having a flying dream for a long time
And this is like the night before the full moon so which is kind of interesting so maybe I'll have
Another uh cool dream tonight because it's the full moon that I start flying you know like an airplane
Over the sky and I go well let's fly really fast like superman so I fly full fly fast but instead of
Flying really fast I kind of I think I like warp drived because all of a sudden I was like
Someplace else because it was so I guess it was like beyond flying fast it's just like going someplace else
And then I was in like another like dimension or something but then I went into another dream but
That was wild to like see these like old men walk by and then like look at me and they're like not
Human you know that was trippy man and then fly like I haven't had a flying dream for so long it was wild
And um but like you know I was listening to like Seth Speaks the last yesterday and he was saying
Like you know when you dream you have other people they're actually real people and sometimes they're
Like they're dead people who you're hanging out with they're like recently dead people who you were
Like helping transition into dead world and like so maybe I was like really looking at like real life
Aliens or something flying around someplace with them I was crazy so it'd be cool to have another dream
Like that okay peace out
